name: Chocolate Chunk Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour and sugar, then cut in butter until coarse crumbs form. Add nuts and chocolate.
3. In a separate bowl, mix egg yolk and cream. Combine with crumb mixture until moistened.
4. Oil a 10-inch springform pan. Press mixture into the bottom. Bake for 15 minutes. Cool.
5. Reduce oven to 325°F.
6. Using an electric mixer, beat cream cheese and sugar until fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix in sour cream, flour, vanilla, almond extract, and chopped chocolate.
7. Pour filling over crust in pan. Bake for 1 hour or until center jiggles slightly.
8. Mix softened sour cream with brown sugar. Pour over cheesecake. Return to oven and bake 15 minutes longer. Cool completely.
9. Heat whipping cream, add chopped chocolate, stirring until smooth. Cool to room temperature. Drizzle over cooled cheesecake.
From Lakehouse Restaurant, Lake Oswego. From the Oregonian FOODday, 1/5/93.
